enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as 'an
NBFC'):
(1) The provisions given in Paragraphs 6 to19, 23 to 33, 50 to 51 and 53 to 57
shall apply to deposit taking NBFC (NBFC-D) registered with the RBI under
the provisions of the RBI Act,1934;
enriched_requirements.object: following Non-Banking Financial Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as 'an NBFC'): (1) Th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The provisions given in Paragraphs 6 to19, 23 to 33 and 50 to 57 shall apply
to the following, subject to specified layer-wise applicability:

Provided that,
Paragraphs 7 to 14 are not applicable for NBFC-Base Layer (NBFC-BL)
having 'customer interface but not availing public funds'.
enriched_requirements.object: 14 are not applicable for NBFC-Base Layer (NBFC-BL) having 'customer interface but not availing public funds'
of the above-mentioned categories in sub-para (2) for all layers
of the above-mentioned categories in sub-para (2) for Middle Layer and above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The provisions contained in paragraphs 58 to 60 shall be applicable to
Infrastructure Debt Fund-Non-Banking Financial Company (IDF-NBFC) only;
enriched_requirements.object: Debt Fund-Non-Banking Financial Company (IDF-NBFC) only
Finance Company (HFC) registered with the RBI
Standalone Primary Dealer (NBFC-SPD) registered with the RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The provisions contained in Paragraphs 7 to14, 20 to 22 and 34 to 39 shall
be applicable to NBFC-Core Investment Company (NBFC-CIC) registered
with the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: Investment Company (NBFC-CIC) registered with the RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which the NBFC currently has or
previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity instruments)
anytime during the preceding twelve months;
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which the NBFC currently has or previously had a loan or investmen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Equity instrument' means equity shares, compulsorily convertible
preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD);
enriched_requirements.object: preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the 'business
of financial services'.
enriched_requirements.object: the 'business of financial services'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include:

The Board of an NBFC intending to undertake distribution of mutual fund products
shall approve a comprehensive policy regarding undertaking mutual funds
distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well as grievance
redressal mechanism in addition to fulfilling the other terms and conditions as
prescribed in paragraphs 50 and 51.
enriched_requirements.object: regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well as grievance redressa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A comprehensive Board approved policy
regarding undertaking insurance distribution by HFC, whether under the agency
or the broking model should be formulated and services should be offered to
customers in accordance with this policy as prescribed in paragraph 45.
enriched_requirements.object: should be offered to customers in accordance with this policy as prescribed in paragraph 45

conditions: IF Scheme
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: its investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall not individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of
an AIF Scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: 10 percent of the corpus of an AIF Scheme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate contribution by all regulated entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme shall
not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: percent of the corpus of that scheme
(including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks and Regional Rural Banks)

conditions: IF Scheme
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where an NBFC contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF
Scheme that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a
debtor company of the NBFC, the NBFC shall be required to make 100 percent
provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company
<image>
through the AIF Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to NBFC's direct loan and /
or investment exposure to the said debtor company.
enriched_requirements.object: 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company <image> through the AIF Scheme

conditions:
where an NBFC's
contribution is in the form of subordinated units
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 10 above, where an NBFC's
contribution is in the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire
investment from its capital funds‒proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2
capital (wherever applicable).
enriched_requirements.object: from its capital funds‒proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

conditions: IF contained in Part B of Chapter II
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from the scope of these Directions on
AIF contained in Part B of Chapter II, except for paragraph 7 above.
enriched_requirements.object: the Government of India, by way of a notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from the scope of these Directions on AIF contained in Part B of Chapter II

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be read in conjunction with the guidelines issued by the
Foreign Exchange Department (FED) of the RBI and shall apply to an NBFC
intending to open a, subsidiary, joint venture, or undertake investment abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: with the guidelines issued by the Foreign Exchange Department (FED) of the RBI and shall apply to an NBFC intending to open a,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall obtain prior approval of the RBI for opening of subsidiary / joint
venture or undertaking investment abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: the RBI for opening of subsidiary / joint venture or undertaking investment abroad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The application from the NBFC seeking
No Objection shall be considered subject to compliance with general and specific
conditions prescribed in paragraphs 17 and 18.
enriched_requirements.object: compliance with general and specific conditions prescribed in paragraphs 17 and 18

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Direct investment in activities prohibited under FEMA or in sectoral funds
shall not be permitted;

(3) Investments shall be permitted only in entities whose core activity is
regulated by a financial sector regulator in the host jurisdiction;
enriched_requirements.object: entities whose core activity is regulated by a financial sector regulator in the host jurisdiction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The aggregate overseas investment shall not exceed 100 percent of the
NBFC's Net Owned Fund (NOF).
enriched_requirements.object: the NBFC's Net Owned Fund (NOF)
percent of the NBFC's owned funds
structures and at most only a single intermediate holding entity shall be permitted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The CRAR / leverage of the NBFC, post investment in subsidiary abroad
shall be not less than the regulatory prescriptions;
enriched_requirements.object: the regulatory prescriptions
required level of NOF after accounting for investment in the proposed subsidiary / investment abroad as prescribed in the exp

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The level of Net Non-Performing Assets of the NBFC shall not be more than
five percent of the net advances;
enriched_requirements.object: percent of the net advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(9) An NBFC shall have been in profit for the last three financial years and shall
have demonstrated satisfactory performance during the period of its
existence;
enriched_requirements.object: for the last three financial years and shall have demonstrated satisfactory performance during the period of its existence

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) An NBFC shall comply with the regulations issued under FEMA,1999 from
time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: issued under FEMA,1999 from time to time

conditions: if held by the NBFC
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(11) An NBFC's overall regulatory compliance, including servicing of public
deposits, if held by the NBFC, shall be satisfactory;
(12) An NBFC shall comply with the KYC guidelines;
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines
or subsidiary / joint venture abroad, depending upon percentage of investment in overseas entity

conditions: where it is registered
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(14) An NBFC shall submit annual certificate from the statutory to the Regional
Office of Department of Supervision of the RBI where it is registered,
certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated under
these Directions for overseas investment;
enriched_requirements.object: the statutory to the Regional Office of Department of Supervision of the RBI where it is registered, certifying that it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals for
investment abroad shall be subject to this condition.
enriched_requirements.object: condition

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC proposing to establish a subsidiary abroad shall comply with all the
conditions as stipulated in paragraph 16 above.
enriched_requirements.object: conditions as stipulated in paragraph 16 above
guarantee to or on behalf of such subsidiaries

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) No request for issuance of a letter of comfort in favour of the subsidiary
abroad from any institution in India shall be permitted;

(3) The liability of the NBFC in the proposed overseas entity shall be limited to
its either equity or fund-based commitment to the subsidiary;
enriched_requirements.object: either equity or fund-based commitment to the subsidiary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (4) The overseas subsidiary shall not be a shell company.

enriched_requirements.object: companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(5) The overseas subsidiary shall not be used as a vehicle for raising resources
for creating assets in India for the Indian operations;
enriched_requirements.object: vehicle for raising resources for creating assets in India for the Indian operations
audit reports about the business undertaken by the subsidiary abroad and shall make them available to the RBI and inspecti

conditions:
If the overseas subsidiary fails to undertake any activity or if the required
reports are not submitted
enriched_requirements.object: approval given for setting up a subsidiary abroad
Balance Sheet to the effect that liability of the parent entity in the proposed overseas entity is limited to its either equity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(9) All the operations of the subsidiary abroad shall be subject to regulatory
prescriptions of the host country.
enriched_requirements.object: prescriptions of the host country

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All overseas investments by an NBFC, other than in subsidiaries, shall be
governed by the same guidelines as applicable to subsidiaries established abroad,
as specified in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: same guidelines as applicable to subsidiaries established abroad, as specified in these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All CICs investing in Joint
Venture/Subsidiary overseas in the financial sector shall require prior approval
from the Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CICs desirous of making overseas investment in financial sector
shall hold a Certificate of Registration (CoR) from the Bank and shall comply with
all the regulations applicable to CIC.
enriched_requirements.object: Registration (CoR) from the Bank and shall comply with all the regulations applicable to CIC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CICs that are presently exempted from the
regulatory framework of the Bank (unregistered CICs), shall be required to be
registered with the Bank and shall be regulated like a registered CIC, where they
intend to make overseas investment in financial sector
6 Financial sector for this purpose would mean a sector/service regulated by a Financial Sector
Regulator
<image>
A.2.2 Investment in non-financial sector
21.
enriched_requirements.object: registered with the Bank and shall be regulated like a registered CIC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unregistered CICs making overseas investment in non-financial sector shall not
require registration from the Bank and hence, these Directions are not applicable
to them.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank and hence, these Directions are not applicable to them

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 30 days of such investment in the stipulated
format and at the prescribed periodicity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, it shall report to the Regional Office
of DoS where it is registered within 30 days of such investment in the stipulated
format and at the prescribed periodicity.
enriched_requirements.object: Office of DoS where it is registered within 30 days of such investment in the stipulated format and at the prescribed periodici

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The Adjusted Net Worth (ANW) of the CIC shall not be less than 30% of
its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted
value of off-balance sheet items as on the date of the last audited balance
sheet as at the end of the financial year.
enriched_requirements.object: of its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as on the date of the last

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CIC shall continue to meet
the requirement of minimum ANW, post overseas investment.
enriched_requirements.object: requirement of minimum ANW, post overseas investment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this
purpose, the risk weights applicable shall be as provided for in the
directions.
enriched_requirements.object: in the directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The level of Net Non-Performing Assets of the CIC shall not be more than
1% of the net advances as on the date of the last audited balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: of the net advances as on the date of the last audited balance sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The CIC shall generally be earning profit continuously for the last three
years and its performance shall be satisfactory during the period of its
existence.
enriched_requirements.object: continuously for the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory during the period of its existence

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Direct investment in activities prohibited under FEMA shall not be
permitted.

(ii) The total overseas investment shall not exceed 400% of the owned funds
of the CIC.
enriched_requirements.object: owned funds of the CIC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The total overseas investment in financial sector shall not exceed 200%
of its owned funds.
enriched_requirements.object: owned funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (iv) Investment in financial sector shall be only in regulated entities abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: entities abroad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) Entities set up abroad or acquired abroad shall be treated as wholly owned
subsidiaries (WOS) /joint ventures (JV) abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: owned subsidiaries (WOS) /joint ventures (JV) abroad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) Overseas investments by a CIC in financial /non-financial sector shall be
restricted to its financial commitment.
enriched_requirements.object: financial commitment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, with regard to issuing
guarantees/Letter of Comfort in this regard the following shall be noted:

(b) CICs must ensure that investments made overseas shall not result
in creation of complex structures.
enriched_requirements.object: complex structures

conditions:
In case the structure overseas
requires a Non-Operating Holding Company
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the structure overseas
requires a Non-Operating Holding Company, there shall not be more
than two tiers in the structure.
enriched_requirements.object: tiers in the structure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CICs having more than one non-
operating holding company in existence, in their investment
structure, shall report the same to the Bank for a review.
enriched_requirements.object: the Bank for a review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(c) CICs shall comply with the regulations issued under FEMA, 1999
from time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: issued under FEMA, 1999 from time to time

conditions: where it is registered
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(d) An annual certificate from statutory auditors shall be submitted by
the CIC to the Regional Office of DoS where it is registered, certifying
that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated under these
Guidelines for overseas investment.
enriched_requirements.object: CIC to the Regional Office of DoS where it is registered, certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The certificate as on end March
every year shall be submitted by April 30 each year;
enriched_requirements.object: 30 each year

conditions: If any serious adverse features come to the notice of the Bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(e) If any serious adverse features come to the notice of the Bank, the
permission granted shall be withdrawn.

All approvals for investment
abroad shall be subject to this condition.
enriched_requirements.object: condition

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) In the case of opening of a WOS/JV abroad by a CIC, all the conditions as
stipulated above shall be applicable.

In addition, the
following conditions shall apply to all CICs:

(a) The WOS/JV being established abroad shall not be a shell company
i.e., "a company that is incorporated, but has no significant assets or
operations." However, companies undertaking activities such as
financial consultancy and advisory services shall not be considered
as shell companies;
enriched_requirements.object: i
vehicle for raising resources for creating assets in India for the Indian operations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(c) In order to ensure compliance of the provisions, the parent CIC shall
obtain periodical reports/audit reports at least quarterly about the
business undertaken by the WOS/JV abroad and shall make them
available to the inspecting officials of the Bank;
enriched_requirements.object: at least quarterly about the business undertaken by the WOS/JV abroad and shall make them available to the ins

conditions:
If the WOS/JV has not undertaken any activity or such reports are
not forthcoming
if guarantees are given
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(e) The WOS/JV shall make disclosure in its Balance Sheet the amount
of liability of the parent entity towards it and also whether it is limited
to equity / loan or if guarantees are given, the nature of such
guarantees and the amount involved;
enriched_requirements.object: Balance Sheet the amount of liability of the parent entity towards it and also whether it is limited to equity / loan or if gua

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(f) All the operations of the WOS/JV abroad shall be subject to
regulatory prescriptions of the host country.
enriched_requirements.object: prescriptions of the host country

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC receiving Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) under the automatic route
shall be permitted to undertake only those activities that are permissible under the
automatic route.
enriched_requirements.object: only those activities that are permissible under the automatic route

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Diversification into any other activity shall require the prior approval of the Foreign
Investment Promotion Board (FIPB).
enriched_requirements.object: of the Foreign Investment Promotion Board (FIPB)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A company which has entered into a permissible FDI activity (e.g., software) and
later seeks to diversify into the NBFC sector shall comply with all applicable
regulations including minimum capitalization norms.
enriched_requirements.object: regulations including minimum capitalization norms

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall make an application for entry into the insurance business, along
with necessary particulars duly certified by its statutory auditors, through
PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to the Department of Regulation
(DoR), Central Office, RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: entry into the insurance business, along with necessary particulars duly certified by its statutory auditors, through PRAVAAH

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An NBFC shall not be allowed to conduct such business departmentally.
enriched_requirements.object: such business departmentally

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A
subsidiary or company in the same group of an NBFC or of another NBFC
engaged in the business of a non-banking financial institution or banking business
shall not normally be allowed to join the insurance company on a risk participation
basis.
enriched_requirements.object: join the insurance company on a risk participation basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC registered with the RBI shall be permitted to set up a joint venture (JV)
company for undertaking insurance business with risk participation subject to the
following conditions:
(1) An NBFC shall not hold more than 50 percent of the paid-up capital of the JV
insurance company.
enriched_requirements.object: percent of the paid-up capital of the JV insurance company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The RBI may, on a selective basis, permit a higher
equity contribution by a promoter NBFC initially, subject to divestment of
equity within the prescribed period [see Note (1) below].
enriched_requirements.object: basis, permit a higher equity contribution by a promoter NBFC initially

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case more than one company (irrespective of doing financial activity or
not) in the same group of the NBFC wishes to take a stake in the insurance
company, the contribution by all companies in the same group shall be
counted for the limit of 50 percent prescribed for the NBFC in an insurance
JV.
enriched_requirements.object: limit of 50 percent prescribed for the NBFC in an insurance JV

conditions: In case of capital infusion calls by IRDAI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In case of capital infusion calls by IRDAI, into the Insurance JV company, the
RBI may, on a case-to-case basis, consider need-based relaxation of the 50
percent group limit as specified.
enriched_requirements.object: basis, consider need-based relaxation of the 50 percent group limit as specified

conditions: if permitted
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Relaxation, if permitted, shall be subject to
compliance by the NBFC with all regulatory conditions as prescribed in these
Directions and such other conditions as may be necessary in the specific
case.
enriched_requirements.object: by the NBFC with all regulatory conditions as prescribed in these Directions and such other conditions as may be necessary in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Application for such relaxation along with supporting documents shall
be submitted by the NBFC through PRAVAAH Portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to the Department of Regulation (DoR), Central
Office, RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC through PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) An NBFC shall meet the following eligibility criteria for the joint venture:
Note:
(1) Holding of equity by a promoter NBFC in an insurance company or
participation in any form in insurance business shall be subject to compliance
with any rules and regulations laid down by the IRDAI / Central Government.
enriched_requirements.object: criteria for the joint venture: Note: (1) Holding of equity by a promoter NBFC in an insurance company or participation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The eligibility criteria shall be reckoned with reference to the latest available
audited balance sheet for the previous year.
enriched_requirements.object: to the latest available audited balance sheet for the previous year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notes:
(1) Holding of equity by a promoter CIC in an insurance company or investment
in insurance business shall be subject to compliance with any rules and
regulations laid down by the IRDA/Central Government.
enriched_requirements.object: with any rules and regulations laid down by the IRDA/Central Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (i) The owned fund of the NBFC shall not be less than ₹500 crore,
enriched_requirements.object: crore,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (ii) The CRAR of the NBFC shall be not less than 15 percent,
enriched_requirements.object: 15 percent,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The level of net non-performing assets shall be not more than five
percent of the total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and
advances taken together,
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: five percent of the total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and advances taken together, <image>

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) An NBFC shall have made net profit in the preceding three consecutive
financial years,
enriched_requirements.object: in the preceding three consecutive financial years,

conditions:
if any, of the
concerned NBFC shall be satisfactory
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) The track record of the performance of the subsidiaries, if any, of the
concerned NBFC shall be satisfactory,

The provisions of the RBI Act, 1934 shall be applicable
for such investments while computing NOF of the NBFC.
enriched_requirements.object: investments while computing NOF of the NBFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case where a foreign partner contributes 26 percent of the insurance JV's equity
with the approval of IRDAI / Foreign Investment Promotion Board, participation by
more than one NBFC in the equity of the insurance JV may be permitted.

Only
NBFCs satisfying the criteria given in paragraph 28 above, shall be eligible to
participate in such cases.
enriched_requirements.object: in such cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC not eligible to participate as JV partner, as above can make investments
up to 10 percent of the owned fund of the NBFC or ₹50 crore, whichever is lower,
in the insurance company, subject to the following conditions:
(1) The CRAR of the NBFC shall not be less than 15 percent;
enriched_requirements.object: percent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The level of net NPA shall be not more than five percent of total outstanding
leased / hire purchase assets and advances;
enriched_requirements.object: five percent of total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) NBFC shall have been in net profit in the preceding three consecutive
financial years.
enriched_requirements.object: profit in the preceding three consecutive financial years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such participation shall be treated as an investment and shall be without any
contingent liability for the NBFC.
enriched_requirements.object: investment and shall be without any contingent liability for the NBFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Taking up Insurance Agency Business
HFCs having Net Owned Fund (NOF) of not less than the prescribed NOF may
take up insurance agency business on fee basis and without any risk participation,
without the approval of the Bank, subject to the following conditions:
(1) The HFC should obtain requisite permission from Insurance Regulatory and
Development Authority (IRDA) and comply with the IRDA regulations for
acting as 'composite corporate agent' with insurance companies;
enriched_requirements.object: business on fee basis and without any risk participation, without the approval of the Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The HFC should not adopt any restrictive practice of forcing its customers to
go in only for a particular insurance company in respect of assets financed
by it.
enriched_requirements.object: of forcing its customers to go in only for a particular insurance company in respect of assets financed by it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The customers should be allowed to exercise their own choice;
enriched_requirements.object: their own choice

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) As the participation by a HFC's customer in insurance products is purely on
a voluntary basis, it should be stated in all publicity material distributed by it
in a prominent way.
enriched_requirements.object: publicity material distributed by it in a prominent way
direct or indirect between the provision of financial services offered by the HFC to its customers and use of the insurance pro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The premium should be paid by the insured directly to the insurance
company without routing through the HFC;
enriched_requirements.object: insured directly to the insurance company without routing through the HFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(5) The risks, if any, involved in insurance agency should not get transferred to
the business of the HFC.
enriched_requirements.object: business of the HFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On
a selective basis, the Bank may permit a higher equity contribution by a
promoter HFC initially, pending divestment of equity within the prescribed
period.
enriched_requirements.object: contribution by a promoter HFC initially, pending divestment of equity within the prescribed period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (i) The NOF of the HFC should not be less than ₹500 crore;
enriched_requirements.object: crore

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (ii) The CRAR of the HFC should be not less than 12%;

enriched_requirements.object: 3% of the total outstanding assets, including loans and advances taken together

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (iv) The HFC should have net profit for the last three continuous years;
enriched_requirements.object: the last three continuous years

conditions:
if any, of the
concerned HFC should be satisfactory
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) The track record of the performance of the subsidiaries, if any, of the
concerned HFC should be satisfactory;

conditions:
where a foreign partner contributes 26 per cent of the equity with the
approval of IRDA/ Foreign Investment Promotion Board
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case where a foreign partner contributes 26 per cent of the equity with the
approval of IRDA/ Foreign Investment Promotion Board, more than one HFC
may be allowed to participate in the equity of the Insurance JV Company.
enriched_requirements.object: in the equity of the Insurance JV Company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In case more than one company (irrespective of doing financial activity or
not) in the same group of the HFC wishes to take a stake in the insurance
company, the contribution by all companies in the same group shall be
counted for the limit of 50 per cent prescribed for the HFC in an Insurance
JV Company.
enriched_requirements.object: limit of 50 per cent prescribed for the HFC in an Insurance JV Company

conditions:
where IRDA issues calls for capital infusion into the Insurance JV
Company
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In cases where IRDA issues calls for capital infusion into the Insurance JV
Company, the Bank may, on a case to case basis, consider need based
relaxation of the 50% group limit specified above.
enriched_requirements.object: to case basis, consider need based relaxation of the 50% group limit specified above

conditions: if permitted
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The relaxation, if permitted,
will be subject to compliance by the HFC with all regulatory conditions
specified under the guidelines and such other conditions as may be
necessary in the specific case.
enriched_requirements.object: specific case

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such
participation shall be treated as an investment and should be without any
contingent liability for the HFC.
enriched_requirements.object: investment and should be without any contingent liability for the HFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (i) The NOF of the HFC should not be less than ₹100 crore;
enriched_requirements.object: crore

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The level of net non-performing assets should be not more than 3% of the
total outstanding assets taken together;
enriched_requirements.object: 3% of the total outstanding assets taken together

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It should be ensured that risks involved in insurance business
do not get transferred to the HFC and that the HFC business does not get
contaminated by any risks which may arise from insurance business.

There should
be an 'arms-length' relationship between the HFCs and the insurance outfit.
enriched_requirements.object: between the HFCs and the insurance outfit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Board Approved Policy
(1) A comprehensive Board approved policy regarding undertaking insurance
distribution, whether under the agency or the broking model should be
formulated, and services should be offered to customers in accordance with
<image>
this policy.
enriched_requirements.object: should be offered to customers in accordance with <image> this policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It may be
noted that as IRDA Guidelines do not permit group entities to take up both
corporate agency and broking in the same group even through separate
entities, HFCs or their group entities may undertake either insurance broking
or corporate agency business.
enriched_requirements.object: IRDA Guidelines do not permit group entities to take up both corporate agency and broking in the same group even through separate ent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Compliance with IRDA Guidelines
(1) The IRDA (Licensing of Corporate Agents) Regulations, 2002, as amended
from time to time, as applicable, should be complied with by HFCs
undertaking these activities.
enriched_requirements.object: HFCs undertaking these activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The deposit to be maintained by an insurance broker as per the IRDA
(Licensing of Banks as Insurance Brokers) Regulations, 2013, as amended
from time to time, should be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank.
enriched_requirements.object: scheduled commercial bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Ensuring Customer Appropriateness and Suitability
While undertaking insurance distribution business, either under the corporate
agency or broking model under the relevant IRDA Regulations, HFCs must keep
the following in view:
(1) All employees dealing with insurance agency/ broking business should
possess the requisite qualification prescribed by IRDA.
enriched_requirements.object: view: (1) All employees dealing with insurance agency/ broking business should possess the requisite qualification prescribed by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) There should be a system of assessment of the suitability of products for
customers.
enriched_requirements.object: assessment of the suitability of products for customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It should be ensured that there is a
standardized system of assessing the needs of the customer and that
initiation/ transactional and approval processes are segregated.
enriched_requirements.object: is a standardized system of assessing the needs of the customer and that initiation/ transactional and approval processes are se

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) HFCs should treat their customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with
regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold.
enriched_requirements.object: honestly and transparently, with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC desirous of undertaking distributing mutual funds, shall be required to
adhere to the following stipulations:
<image>
(1) Operational Aspects
enriched_requirements.object: to the following stipulations: <image> (1) Operational Aspects

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) An NBFC shall comply with the SEBI guidelines / regulations, including
its code of conduct, for distribution of mutual fund products;
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines / regulations, including its code of conduct, for distribution of mutual fund products

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) An NBFC shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its
customers to opt for a particular mutual fund product sponsored by it.
enriched_requirements.object: of compelling its customers to opt for a particular mutual fund product sponsored by it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Its customers shall be allowed to exercise their own choice;
enriched_requirements.object: their own choice

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) All publicity materials shall prominently state that the participation by its
customers in mutual fund products is purely on a voluntary basis.
enriched_requirements.object: participation by its customers in mutual fund products is purely on a voluntary basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There
shall be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provisions of
financial services offered by the NBFC to its customers and distribution
of the mutual fund products;
enriched_requirements.object: direct or indirect between the provisions of financial services offered by the NBFC to its customers and distribution of the mu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) An NBFC shall only act as an agent of its customers, forwarding their
applications for purchase / sale of MF units together with the payment
instruments, to the Mutual Fund / the Registrars / the transfer agents.
enriched_requirements.object: agent of its customers, forwarding their applications for purchase / sale of MF units together with the payment instruments, to the Mut

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The purchase of units shall be at the customers' risk and without the
NBFC guaranteeing any assured return;
enriched_requirements.object: risk and without the NBFC guaranteeing any assured return
mutual funds from the secondary market for sale to its customers, nor shall it buy back units of mutual funds from its custom

conditions:
In case the NBFC is holding custody of MF units on behalf of its
customers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) In case the NBFC is holding custody of MF units on behalf of its
customers, it shall ensure that its own investments and the investments
belonging to its customers are kept distinct from each other.
enriched_requirements.object: investments and the investments belonging to its customers are kept distinct from each other

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) An NBFC shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy
regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer
appropriateness and suitability as well as grievance redressal
mechanism.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The services relating to the same shall be offered to its
customers in accordance with this policy.
enriched_requirements.object: customers in accordance with this policy
the NBFC undertaking this activity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) An NBFC shall be adhering to KYC guidelines and provisions of
Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines and provisions of Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall comply with other terms and conditions as the RBI may specify in
this regard from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: and conditions as the RBI may specify in this regard from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A non-deposit accepting NBFC may act as sub-agent under MTSS without prior
approval of the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: MTSS without prior approval of the RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Deposit accepting NBFC shall not undertake such activity.

An NBFC in the Base Layer shall not undertake Point of Presence (PoP) services
for National Pension System (NPS) under Pension Fund Regulatory and
Development Authority.
enriched_requirements.object: (PoP) services for National Pension System (NPS) under Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC (other than Base Layer NBFC) complying with the prescribed CRAR and
have made net profit in the preceding financial year shall be permitted to undertake
PoP services under PFRDA for NPS after registration with PFRDA.
enriched_requirements.object: PoP services under PFRDA for NPS after registration with PFRDA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An eligible NBFC extending such services shall deposit the NPS subscription
collected by them from the public on the day of collection itself (T+0 basis;
enriched_requirements.object: collected by them from the public on the day of collection itself (T+0 basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC conducting PoP services shall strictly adhere to the guidelines framed
by PFRDA.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines framed by PFRDA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any violation of the above instructions shall invite supervisory action, including but
not limited to cancellation of permission to undertake PoP services.
enriched_requirements.object: but not limited to cancellation of permission to undertake PoP services
(1) a trust, registered as an IDF-Mutual Fund and regulated by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall be eligible to sponsor (sponsorship as defined by SEBI Regulations
for Mutual Funds) IDF-MFs with prior approval of the RBI subject to the following
conditions (based on the audited financial statements), in addition to those
prescribed by SEBI:
(1) An NBFC shall have a minimum NOF of ₹300 crore and CRAR of 15 percent;
enriched_requirements.object: (sponsorship as defined by SEBI Regulations for Mutual Funds) IDF-MFs with prior approval of the RBI subject to the following c

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) Its net NPAs shall be less than three percent of the net advances;
enriched_requirements.object: percent of the net advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) It shall have been in existence for at least five years;
enriched_requirements.object: for at least five years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) It shall be earning profits for the last three years and its performance shall be
satisfactory;
enriched_requirements.object: the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The CRAR of the NBFC post investment in the IDF-MF shall not be less than
the regulatory minimum prescribed for it;
enriched_requirements.object: regulatory minimum prescribed for it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) An NBFC shall continue to maintain the required level of NOF after
accounting for investment in the proposed IDF-MF;
enriched_requirements.object: required level of NOF after accounting for investment in the proposed IDF-MF

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(7) There shall be no supervisory concerns with respect to the NBFC.
enriched_requirements.object: with respect to the NBFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC that fulfils the eligibility criteria as above shall approach the Department
of Regulation of the RBI, for prior approval to sponsor IDF-MFs.
enriched_requirements.object: Regulation of the RBI, for prior approval to sponsor IDF-MFs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Scheduled Commercial Bank should adhere to the applicable provisions stipulated
under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Undertaking of financial services)
Directions, 2025, updated from time to time, in case a particular business/activity is being
undertaking by both the NBFC as well as its parent bank.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions stipulated under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Undertaking of financial services) Directions, 2025, up

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof, unless otherwise specified.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals
or acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
